strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: The game finally won, the player again shuts down his system.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: What? I'm back in the void again?
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: So I still get down time, even when I win. I guess winning doesn't let me escape the game.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: It's strange but... I always thought the game was a test for me. I assumed when I won it'd be over; maybe I'd pass to a higher plane of existence or something.
strings.panel.p5.narration.1.html: Sorry Radd, no such luck. But as a consolation, you will get to beat up Gnarl some more.
